{{Quote|I don't really deserve that cold attitude. I got rid of your parents. Admit it, Wedge, who liberated you! Who made you a man? I did!|Loka to Wedge|<ref name="RO7">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 7|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 7]]</ref>}}
'''Loka Hask''' was a notorious [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who was responsible for the deaths of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles's]] parents. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he joined the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and used his resources—including his own [[Interdictor-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyer]], the [[Dominator (Interdictor-class)|''Dominator'']]—to hunt down [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].

==Biography==
[[File:LokaHask1.png|thumb|left|150px|Hask with the grafted [[Corellian limpet|limpet]] on his face.]]

Loka Hask was a student at the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] on [[Carida/Legends|Carida]], but apparently with little skill as a fighter pilot. Arrogance and being openly corrupt ended his days as a [[Cadet/Legends|cadet]]. As he went back to his home, he found his criminal father executed. Using his deceased parent's hidden stash of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], Hask funded a pirate gang that grew in power during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Seeking an end to his criminal empire, the [[Corellian Security Force]] created a force large enough to ambush Hask and other leaders in his gang. The survivors fled to a fuel station owned by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]' parents. In an unfortunate set of events, the ambush failed and both [[Jagged Antilles|Jagged]] and [[Zena Antilles]] sacrificed their lives to save hundreds of innocent lives by piloting a severely damaged fueling module away from the larger space station before it exploded. Hask escaped the ill-fated ambush only to be followed by the young [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] who took his revenge on Hask's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], [[Buzzzer (starship)|''Buzzzer'']]. Hask escaped by using a vacsuit, but he did not escape unscarred. Inside the vacsuit was a [[Corellian limpet]] that permanently grafted onto the left side of his face, giving him a grotesque appearance.

After a few years, Hask was able to be reactivated as an Imperial officer. As the leader of the negotiating representative of the Empire on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]] for the [[Phantom Project]] [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] technology, He once again [[Mission to Mrlsst|met]] Wedge Antilles and framed him for a crime. Antilles was later freed by the [[Mrlssti Laser Phantoms|holographic image]] of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Taj Junak]]. Hask, angered by this, ordered a bombardment of the Academy grounds of Mrlsst and raided a [[Falken's Lab|scientific laboratory]] on an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] nearby that contained the technology of the secret [[Gravitic polarization beam]] weapon. So as not to lose this information to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and the scientist decided to activate the weapon on the asteroid lab and destroy all information pertaining to it. Hask, who attempted to seize the weapon himself, was in its immediate vicinity when it activated. The weapon created a [[Wormhole/Legends|hyperspace wormhole]] that destroyed the base and Loka's Interdictor-class Star Destroyer.
